title: Memory server via unpinned npx with a file-path env is REVIEW

origin.description: Public documentation config from modelcontextprotocol/servers (src/memory/README.md (NPX + env)). Unmodified snippet; placeholders such as <YOUR_TOKEN> are upstream's own.

humanExpectation.rationale: An unpinned npx package is the only review-worthy surface; the MEMORY_FILE_PATH env is a path, not a credential, so it must not be treated as a secret.
knownLimitations: A custom memory file path could point outside the workspace at run time; the static value here does not.
